title: Tropical Paella with Fresh Fruit
description: A gluten-free twist on the classic Spanish dish, featuring juicy fruit and a flavorful paella.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chorizo and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced red bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is tender.
Stir in the diced fruit and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional fruit if desired.
